name: algovoi-mcp-server
description: Accept crypto payments on Algorand, VOI, Hedera, and Stellar from any MCP client (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf). Create hosted checkout links, verify on-chain payments, and generate MPP / x402 / AP2 challenges. Supports all 16 AlgoVoi networks — USDC + native tokens (ALGO, VOI, HBAR, XLM) on mainnet and testnet.
